videos.headline: Snell breaks Kentucky record with TD
videos.description: Benny Snell Jr. makes Wildcats history with 3,843 rushing yards after running for a 12-yard touchdown against Penn State.

videos.headline: Kentucky not fooled by Penn State's fake punt
videos.description: Kentucky's defense stops Penn State from getting a first down on a fake punt in the first quarter.

videos.headline: Kentucky's Bowden Jr. returns punt to the house
videos.description: Lynn Bowden Jr. returns Penn State's punt 58 yards to the end zone, putting the Wildcats up 10-0.

videos.headline: McSorley throws short TD pass to Bowers
videos.description: Trace McSorley throws to Nick Bowers in the end zone to put the Nittany Lions on the board.

videos.headline: McSorley sacked by Allen
videos.description: Kentucky's Josh Allen sacks Penn State QB Trace McSorley on third-and-6.

videos.headline: Snell Jr. hurdles defender
videos.description: Kentucky's Benny Snell Jr. hurdles a Penn State defender on a 32-yard gain.

videos.headline: Penn State's Brown ejected for targeting
videos.description: Cam Brown is ejected from the game after a helmet-to-helmet hit on Kentucky's Lynn Bowden Jr.

videos.headline: McSorley keeps it for TD
videos.description: Trace McSorley runs the ball up the middle 1 yard to score for Penn State in the fourth quarter.

videos.headline: McSorley finds Freiermuth for TD
videos.description: Trace McSorley finds Pat Freiermuth who dives in for a Nittany Lions touchdown in the fourth quarter.

videos.headline: Snell on record-breaking performance: 'Coach gave me the nod'
videos.description: Benny Snell Jr. credits Kentucky's offensive line and feels "blessed" after breaking the UK career record for rushing yards.
